snippet: The RAG framework wars of 2025: LlamaIndex 0.11 ships multi-modal retrieval, LangChain adds graph RAG, Haystack goes async-native. Exciting time to build AI applications.
author: zara.bsky.social

snippet: Evaluated 5 RAG frameworks this week. LlamaIndex wins on flexibility, LangChain wins on ecosystem, DSPy wins on optimization. The trend toward programmatic prompting is real.
author: alex.bsky.social
